title: Job Opening Category Manager at Boat Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Boat Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Boat Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Howrah location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Boat Digital Technologies:
Boat Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boat Digital Technologies!
